file_insights.purpose: Background layer for adaptive launcher icon
key_details: Fills entire canvas with primary color (@color/primary)
Part of Android 8.0+ adaptive icon system

file_insights.purpose: Foreground layer for adaptive launcher icon
key_details: Vector drawable representing stylized 'I' letter for Inventory app
Uses group with scaling (0.5x) and translation (27dp offsets)
White fill color (#FFFFFF) hardcoded instead of color reference
file_insights.code_quality: Well-documented, but missing color resource reference

key_details: Enables system to apply device-specific icon shapes
Excellent documentation explaining API 26+ adaptive icon behavior

patterns_discovered: Separation of concerns: background, foreground, and configuration layers
Use of vector drawables for scalability and smaller file sizes
Comprehensive inline XML comments explaining purpose and API level requirements
Consistent use of dp units and proper viewport sizing (108x108)
Group transformations for centering content within viewport
gotchas_discovered: No fallback icon resources created for Android API < 26 (pre-8.0)
Foreground icon uses hardcoded #FFFFFF color instead of @color reference - breaks if theme colors change
Icon design is minimal (single 'I' letter) - may not scale well on all device icon shapes
No testing noted for different device manufacturer icon shapes (circle, rounded square, teardrop, squircle)
Vector path data for letter 'I' is simplistic and may appear pixelated at different scales
Missing mipmap resources for older API levels (mipmap-hdpi, mipmap-xxhdpi, etc.)
discoveries.approach_outcome: SUCCESS - Complete adaptive icon system created using modern Android best practices. All files properly structured with vector drawables and adaptive icon configuration. Well-documented with XML comments explaining API requirements and design decisions.
recommendations: Add fallback bitmap icons in mipmap folders (mipmap-hdpi, mipmap-xhdpi, mipmap-xxhdpi) for pre-API 26 devices
Replace hardcoded #FFFFFF in ic_launcher_foreground.xml with a color reference like @color/surface_on_primary
Test icon appearance across different device shapes and manufacturers
Consider enhancing the 'I' icon design with better visual styling or custom artwork
Add proper launcher icon using AndroidStudio's Image Asset Studio for production-quality icons
Document API level compatibility requirements in app-level README
